title: Dialpad + Monday CRM
excerpt: Hey! My team is developing a custom solution to integrate phone systems like DialPad, RingCentral, Aircall, and others into Monday CRM. For example, when a new call is logged in the phone system, our app will search with…

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey! My team is developing a custom solution to integrate phone systems like DialPad, RingCentral, Aircall, and others into Monday CRM. For example, when a new call is logged in the phone system, our app will search within monday.com for a deal, lead, contact, account, (configured by user) with a matching phone number, and log the call info into the Emails & Activities timeline as a Call Summary. You can join the waitlist here and we’ll reach out to you when the solution is ready!

posts.author: anamtn (anamtn)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello Liam, this sounds awesome! Exactly what we’ve been looking for to integrate Dialpad with Monday.com. I’ve joined the waitlist—any timeline for release? Looking forward to updates!

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey! Thank you. That’s great to hear. We’re currently in the testing phases of our Aircall integration, then we’re going to be taking that same logic over to this Dialpad integration. Don’t have a solid timeline at the moment, but hopefully at or around the start of Q2. I’d be happy to give to your team early as a beta. Let me know!

posts.author: anamtn (anamtn)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello Liam, thanks for your quick answer! I’ll share that information with my team and get back to you.

posts.author: Titus (Titus)
posts.cookedHtml: Is yours the only solution for this work up? If I go with Monday now, what solve do you recommend until your solution is ready? I’m in real estate and need a phone solution quickly, so this might help me jump on board for now. I’m currently considering FreshSales as well…as a former GoHighLevel user. For phone, I use CloudPhone.

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: @Titus Hey. The solution we’re developing right now is first of its kind. We’re expecting to get this Dialpad integration out in the next 4-6 weeks. Will probably have it available to you for testing earlier than that as well.

posts.author: benhowes (Ben Howes 🐨)
posts.cookedHtml:
Just to let everyone know, a full Dialpad integration is now available in the monday.com marketplace: Dialpad Integration - monday.com Marketplace

The integration offers:

  • 2-way contact sync with a board
  • Call logging to the CRM
  • Access call recordings and transcripts via activity in the call log

With the app installed, you emails and activies stream will contain all Dialpad calls with transcript and recordings easily accessible:

Capable Dialpad Integration screenshot881×339 29.7 KB

posts.author: Laura224 (Laura Morgan)
posts.cookedHtml: This definitely hits a nerve. We’ve revisited the topic of properly logging calls in Monday several times, and as long-time CloudTalk users, it’s something that matters to us. Having more control over how records are matched and how CloudTalk calls appear in the timeline sounds very promising. Looking forward to seeing how you approach this.
